name: Painting & Cleaning Services | Girls Painting the Town | Main Line PA
description: Full list of painting and home services by Girls Painting the Town: interior painting, exterior painting, cabinet painting, deck staining, power washing, drywall repair, plaster repair, wallpaper removal, popcorn ceiling removal, and construction cleaning in Delaware County and Main Line, PA.

name: Painting & Home Services — Girls Painting the Town
description: Complete list of professional painting and home improvement services offered by Girls Painting the Town in Delaware County and Main Line, PA.

item.name: Interior Painting
item.description: Professional interior painting for walls, ceilings, trim, doors, and cabinets. We use premium paints and meticulous prep for a flawless finish in any room.
item.areaServed: Delaware County and Main Line, PA

item.name: Exterior Painting
item.description: Expert exterior house painting including siding, trim, shutters, doors, porches, and decks. Proper prep and premium exterior paints for lasting protection.
item.areaServed: Delaware County and Main Line, PA

item.name: Cabinet Painting
item.description: Transform kitchen and bathroom cabinets with professional painting and refinishing. A cost-effective alternative to full cabinet replacement.
item.areaServed: Delaware County and Main Line, PA

item.name: Deck Staining and Sealing
item.description: Professional deck staining, sealing, and restoration to protect wood surfaces from moisture, UV damage, and wear.
item.areaServed: Delaware County and Main Line, PA

item.name: Power Washing
item.description: High-pressure power washing for driveways, decks, siding, fences, and patios. Essential for surface prep before painting.
item.areaServed: Delaware County and Main Line, PA

item.name: Drywall Repair and Installation
item.description: Professional drywall patching, repair, and installation for holes, cracks, and water damage in walls and ceilings.
item.areaServed: Delaware County and Main Line, PA

item.name: Plaster Repair
item.description: Skilled plaster repair and restoration for older homes with original plaster walls and ceilings, common throughout the historic Main Line.
item.areaServed: Delaware County and Main Line, PA

item.name: Wallpaper Removal
item.description: Professional wallpaper removal and wall surface preparation for painting, including repair of any underlying wall damage.
item.areaServed: Delaware County and Main Line, PA

item.name: Popcorn Ceiling Removal
item.description: Safe removal of popcorn (acoustic) ceiling texture followed by smooth ceiling preparation and painting.
item.areaServed: Delaware County and Main Line, PA

item.name: Construction Cleaning
item.description: Thorough post-construction and renovation cleaning for new builds and remodels, leaving spaces spotless and move-in ready.
item.areaServed: Delaware County and Main Line, PA
